onboarding.languageHint: You can change this anytime in your profile.

profile.languageHint: Applies across the site and emails.
profile.languageBetaNotice: This feature is still in beta. Some parts of the site or emails may not be fully translated yet-we’re improving it all the time. Let us know how it feels for you (rough spots, missing text, or anything confusing).

editProfile.title: My Profile
editProfile.otpEmailVerifiedBody: Your email has been verified successfully.
editProfile.otpOrLinkHint: Or click the link in the email to verify directly.
editProfile.toastCouldNotIdentifyConditions: Could not identify conditions from your description
editProfile.toastExtractConditionsFailed: Failed to extract conditions. Please try again.
editProfile.toastModeratorReview: Your profile will be reviewed by a moderator and verified.
editProfile.patientPresetAvatarsHint: Choose one of these illustrations, or upload your own photo above.
editProfile.researcherPresetAvatarsHint: Choose one of these illustrations, or upload your own photo above.

editProfile.toastConditionRequired: At least one medical condition is required
editProfile.toastAllUpToDate: All changes are up to date!

editProfile.handlePlaceholder: e.g., @username or choose from suggestions below
editProfile.handleHint: Your unique handle – choose from suggestions or type your own; your username will be used to keep you anonymous.
editProfile.conditionsInterestedLabel: Medical conditions you are interested in
editProfile.symptomTooltipTitle: Enter symptoms in your own words
editProfile.symptomTooltipBody: You can describe symptoms naturally, like "I have high BP" or "chest pain". Our system will automatically identify the medical condition (e.g., "Hypertension" or "Cardiac issues") and add it to your profile.
editProfile.conditionHelper: You can describe symptoms if you're unsure of the condition...
editProfile.institutionPlaceholder: Search for your university (e.g. Harvard, MIT)
editProfile.institutionHint: Type at least 2 characters to search institutions via ROR (e.g. Harvard, MIT, Johns Hopkins)
editProfile.publicationsDisplayTitle: Publications to display on your profile
editProfile.publicationsDisplayHint: Choose which publications from your ORCID + OpenAlex (exact match) to show when visitors view your profile.
editProfile.publicationsCountHint: {{count}} publication(s) currently displayed on your profile
editProfile.addWorkTitle: Add your work to your public profile
editProfile.addWorkHint: Submit publication or trial details. Admin will moderate and approve before it appears to patients and researchers.
editProfile.academicProfilesHint: Add your ResearchGate or Academia.edu profile. After linking, your profile will be reviewed by a moderator and verified.
editProfile.stripeConnectHint: Connect Stripe before enabling paid meetings.
editProfile.meetingsHint: Turn on meetings, set your rate, and choose your weekly availability.
editProfile.rateHint: Patients will see this on your public expert profile.
editProfile.timezoneSlotsHint: Slots are generated using this timezone. Patients will always see times in their own local timezone.
editProfile.timeWindowsHint: Choose the time ranges when you're available. You can add more than one window per day.
editProfile.slotsBookableHint: Patients will see bookable 30-minute slots inside your available windows, only where you're not already booked.
editProfile.noCommunitiesYet: You haven't followed any communities yet

landing.heroFeatureDesc1: Sourced from trusted research networks and medical institutions.
landing.heroFeatureDesc2: Tailored to your profile, history, and specific health questions.
landing.heroFeatureDesc3: No jargon. Just clear, actionable answers you can actually use.
landing.bullet1: Learn more about yours and your loved one's health
landing.bullet2: Learn and participate in latest treatments
landing.bullet3: Connect with others who are experiencing the same
landing.addToHomeChrome: Open the Chrome menu (⋮) in the top right, then tap <s1>“Add to Home screen”</s1> or <s2>“Install app”</s2>.

publications.enabledInterestsHint: (enabled interests will be combined with search queries)
publications.searchPlaceholder: Try being specific to get more accurate search results....
publications.addKeywordsHint: Add keywords to refine your search (optional).
publications.addTermsToQuery: Add terms to the query box
publications.placeholderAuthor: e.g., Smith J or Smith John
publications.placeholderPublicationType: e.g., Review, Clinical Trial, Case Reports
publications.placeholderJournal: e.g., Nature, JAMA, New England Journal
publications.typeOfArticleHint: Filter by publication type using PubMed's Article Type (PT) index.
publications.matchExplanationDefault: This publication matches {{pct}}% based on your profile, interests, and search criteria. The match considers factors like your medical interests, location, and research preferences.
publications.wantMoreBody: Sign up for free to view all {{count}} matching publications and get personalized recommendations based on your medical interests.
publications.emptyHint: Try adjusting your search criteria or browse different categories.
publications.summaryFailed: Failed to generate summary. Please try again.
publications.simplifyFurtherFailed: Failed to simplify further. Please try again.

tutorialSteps.step1Content: Hi! I'm Yori. This is where you search for research papers. Let's explore together—we'll search for 'hypertension' and I'll show you the key features.
tutorialSteps.step2Content: This is the search area. You can type keywords or add terms as chips. Let me add 'hypertension' for you to try...
tutorialSteps.step3Content: I've added 'hypertension' as your search term. You can add more keywords or remove this one. Now click the Search button to find publications!
tutorialSteps.step4Content: Click Search to run your query. Results will appear below so you can explore the card features.
tutorialSteps.step5Content: Here are your publication cards. Each shows the title, authors, and preview. Let's look at the actions on each card.
tutorialSteps.step6Content: Click here to open the full abstract and publication details in a modal.
tutorialSteps.step7Content: This button gets a plain-language summary of the study—great for understanding complex research at a glance.
tutorialSteps.step8Content: Save publications you care about. You can later generate a report for your doctor or revisit them easily.
tutorialSteps.step9ContentSignedIn: That's me! You can always click the helper in the bottom-right corner to ask questions about publications, trials, or research.
tutorialSteps.step9ContentGuest: That's me! Sign in and use the helper in the bottom-right corner to get personalized help with publications, trials, and research.

publicationDetails.checkingAccessFullText: Checking access and loading full text...
publicationDetails.fullArticleAtPublisher: Full article is available at the publisher.
publicationDetails.restrictedBodyWithJournal: This article is published by {{journal}} and requires a subscription or institutional access to view the full text.
publicationDetails.restrictedBodyGeneric: This article requires a subscription or institutional access to view the full text.
publicationDetails.accessThroughLinks: You can access it through the links below.

explore.heroSubtitle: Browse publications, clinical trials, and connect with experts. No sign-up required to start!
explore.featureSummariesDesc: Get concise, easy‑to‑read summaries of complex publications and trials.
explore.featureInsightsDesc: Extract main findings, methodology, and conclusions at a glance.
explore.featureFullDesc: Access complete information—eligibility criteria, outcomes, authors, and more.
explore.catPubsDesc: Discover research papers and scientific articles. Search by topic, author, or keywords to find relevant studies.
explore.catTrialsDesc: Browse active clinical trials and research studies. Find opportunities to participate in groundbreaking medical research.
explore.catExpertsDesc: Connect with researchers and medical experts. Explore profiles, publications, and collaboration opportunities.
explore.unlockBody: Sign in to get personalized recommendations, save your favorites, and connect with experts in your field.

trials.matchExplanationDefault: This trial matches {{pct}}% based on your profile, medical conditions, location, and eligibility criteria. The match considers factors like your medical interests, location proximity, age, gender, and trial requirements.
trials.useProfileLocationAria: Use my profile location for search
trials.otherTermsTooltip: In the search feature, the Other terms field is used to narrow a search. For example, you may enter the name of a drug or the NCT number of a clinical study to limit the search to study records that contain these words.
trials.otherTermsPlaceholder: Enter drug name, NCT number, etc.
trials.interventionTooltip: A process or action that is the focus of a clinical study. Interventions include drugs, medical devices, procedures, vaccines, and other products that are either investigational or already available. Interventions can also include noninvasive approaches, such as education or modifying diet and exercise.
trials.wantMoreTrialsBody: Sign up for free to view all {{count}} matching trials and get personalized recommendations based on your medical interests.
trials.emptyHint: Try adjusting your search criteria or browse different categories.
trials.linkedToProfile: This trial is linked to your researcher profile.
trials.noContactInfo: No contact information available for this trial.
trials.messageSentBody: Your message has been sent to the moderator. They will get back to you soon.
trials.messagePlaceholderSignedIn: Write your message to the moderator here... or click 'Generate Message' to create one automatically
trials.messagePlaceholderGuest: Write your message to the moderator here... (Sign in to use AI message generation)
trials.eligibilityUnavailable: Eligibility criteria not available. Please review the trial details or contact the trial team directly.
trials.reviewEligibilityHint: Review the eligibility criteria above to ensure you meet the requirements before proceeding.
trials.contactUnavailableStep: Contact information not available for this trial. Please visit the trial's official page for contact details.
trials.saveContactHint: Save this contact information. You'll need it to send your inquiry email.
trials.generateEmailIntro: Click the button below to generate a professional email draft for contacting the trial moderator.
trials.followUpTip1: Wait 1-2 weeks before following up if you don't receive a response
trials.followUpTip2: Keep your follow-up brief — reference your original inquiry and express continued interest
trials.followUpTip3: Be patient — trial coordinators receive many inquiries and may take time to respond
trials.followUpTip4: Consider calling if you have the phone number and haven't received a response after 2 weeks
trials.followUpTip5: Keep records of all communications for your reference
trials.followUpFooter: Following up shows your continued interest and can help ensure your inquiry doesn't get overlooked.
trials.toastTrialLinked: This trial is linked to your profile
trials.toastSignInMessage: Please sign in to generate a message
trials.toastMessageFailed: Failed to generate message. Please try again.
trials.toastSignInEmail: Please sign in to generate an email
trials.toastEmailFailed: Failed to generate email. Please try again.
trials.toastEmailAppOpened: Opened email app — addresses and draft copied to clipboard

tutorialSteps.step1Content: Hi! I'm Yori. This is where you discover clinical trials that match your needs. Let me show you the key features.
tutorialSteps.step2Content: Enter keywords (e.g. a condition or treatment) and use the status filter. You can add multiple keywords to refine your search.
tutorialSteps.step3Content: Your search terms appear here as chips. You can remove or add more. Use the Advanced button for age, sex, phase, and location filters.
tutorialSteps.step4Content: Click Search to find matching trials. Results will appear below with match percentage and key details.
tutorialSteps.step5Content: Matching trials appear here. Each card shows status, phase, and match score. Try searching to see results, then we'll look at the actions on each card.
tutorialSteps.step6Content: Click here to read the full trial description and eligibility criteria.
tutorialSteps.step7Content: Get a plain-language summary of the trial—great for understanding what it's about and who it's for.
tutorialSteps.step8Content: Save trials you're interested in. You can revisit them later or share with your doctor.
tutorialSteps.step9Content: View contact details for the trial site so you can reach out to the study team.
tutorialSteps.step10ContentSignedIn: That's me! You can always click the helper in the bottom-right corner to ask questions about trials, publications, or research.
tutorialSteps.step10ContentGuest: That's me! Sign in and use the helper in the bottom-right corner to get personalized help with trials, publications, and research.

experts.enterTopicOrInstitution: Enter a condition, research focus, or select an institution to search.
experts.onPlatformConflict: Browsing by institution uses global experts. Uncheck "On Platform" or enter a topic.
experts.findExpertNotFound: No researchers found with the name "{{name}}"
experts.findExpertError: Failed to search for expert. Please try again.
experts.loadMoreError: Failed to load more experts. Please try again.
experts.noPublications: No publications found for this researcher
experts.signInConnection: Please sign in to send connection requests
experts.researchersOnlyConnection: Only researchers can send connection requests
experts.noneFoundTryAdjust: No {{label}} found. Try adjusting your search criteria.
experts.searchFailedTryLater: Failed to search {{label}}. Please try again later.
experts.tutorialStep1Content: Hi! I'm Yori. This is where you find and connect with medical researchers. Let me show you the key features.
experts.tutorialStep2Content: Use Explore to search by condition and expertise. Use Find an Expert to search for a researcher by name.
experts.tutorialStep3Content: When **On platform** is checked, you see researchers who are on collabiora. Uncheck it to search global experts from other sources.
experts.tutorialStep4Content: Enter a condition and the expertise you're looking for. You can filter by location. Your medical interest can be used to pre-fill the condition.
experts.tutorialStep5Content: Click Search to find matching researchers. Results show citation metrics and you can expand a card to see publications and actions.
experts.tutorialStep6Content: Matching experts appear here. Expand a card to view their profile, publications, and send a connection request (researchers only).
experts.tutorialStep7Content: Each expert gets a match score based on your search. The bar and explanation show how well they fit your condition and expertise.
experts.tutorialStep8Content: Open the full expert profile to see their research, publications, and how to get in touch.
experts.tutorialStep9Content: Save experts you're interested in so you can find them easily later.
experts.tutorialStep10ContentSignedIn: That's me! You can always click the helper in the bottom-right corner to ask questions about experts, trials, or research.
experts.tutorialStep10ContentGuest: That's me! Sign in and use the helper in the bottom-right corner to get personalized help with experts, trials, and research.

chat.trialAskTellMoreQ: Tell me more about this trial. Summarize the key details and what it's testing.
chat.trialAskInclusionQ: What are the inclusion and exclusion criteria for this trial? Explain who can participate.
chat.trialAskParticipateQ: How can I participate in this trial? What are the steps and who do I contact?
chat.trialAskContactQ: What are the contact details for this trial? Give me phone numbers, emails, or links to sign up.
chat.trialAskLocationsQ: Where is this trial being conducted? List the locations and sites.
chat.pubAskSummarizeQ: Summarize this publication. What are the main findings and conclusions?
chat.pubAskMethodsQ: What methodology and methods were used in this study?
chat.pubAskTakeawaysQ: What are the key takeaways and implications of this research?
chat.expertAskTellMoreQ: Tell me more about this researcher. What are their main contributions and expertise?
chat.expertAskFocusQ: What is this expert's research focus and recent work?

healthNews.disclaimer: Articles are ranked by source reliability (e.g. WHO, CDC, FDA = Authoritative). Sources marked "Use with Caution" are flagged for limited specialist review. Summaries are informational only and not medical advice.
healthNews.cautionAdvocacy: Interpret cautiously — this source is advocacy-focused or has limited specialist review.

community.viewAllOnResearcherForums: View all discussions on Researcher Forums
community.followRulesTitle: Make sure to follow these rules:
community.guidelinesIntro: collabiora is a space for respectful, educational discussion about health research. By participating, you agree to:
community.respect1: Treat all members with respect and kindness
community.respect2: Do not use offensive, discriminatory, or harassing language
community.respect3: Do not promote political agendas, conspiracy theories, or misinformation
community.respect4: Stay focused on health research and educational topics
community.medicalLead: collabiora does not provide medical advice.
community.medical1: Do not ask for personal diagnoses or treatment recommendations
community.medical2: Information shared is for educational purposes only
community.medical3: Always consult your healthcare provider for medical decisions
community.privacy1: Do not share personal identifying medical information
community.privacy2: Do not post another person's private data
community.moderationP1: collabiora reserves the right to remove posts or restrict accounts that violate these guidelines.
community.moderationP2: Our goal is to maintain a safe, supportive, and scientifically grounded community.

curateTrials.pageSubtitle: Paste text or use the structured template, then save. Choose an institution below for where the listing is stored.
curateTrials.confirmSaveBody: This will save {{count}} trial record(s) for UCLA. Existing entries with the same study code will be updated.
curateTrials.templateHelpBody: Fill in the same sections as the live preview (Study Purpose, What Happens, eligibility, contacts, keywords). Use Edit on each block to type content. This matches the Manage trials → Edit curated trial editor and saves to the database the same way.
curateTrials.editModalHint: Same fields as Manage site-listed trials → View & edit. Close to return to the page; your edits stay in sync.
curateTrials.confirmSingleBody: This will save 1 trial for UCLA. Existing entries with the same external study code will be updated.

tutorial.step0Content: Hi! I'm Yori. Welcome to your personal dashboard. Here you'll see your profile and quick access to everything that matters for your health journey.
tutorial.step1Content: Your personalized recommendations appear here—trials, publications, and experts tailored to your conditions and interests. You can edit your medical conditions and refresh the dashboard to get new results.
tutorial.step2Content: Edit your medical conditions here to personalize your feed. Use Refresh to fetch new recommendations based on your updated profile.
tutorial.step3Content: In the publications section, use 'View full details' or 'Simplify' on any card to read more. This opens the full abstract and key takeaways.
tutorial.step4Title: Explore dropdown in the top bar
tutorial.step4Content: Use the Explore dropdown in the top bar to view Health Library, New Treatments, and Health Experts. It's your gateway to discovering new research.
tutorial.step5Content: Forums lets you join community discussions. Discovery is the next link to the right in the navbar; it shows a feed of activity and content across the platform.
tutorial.step6Content: Switch between Health Library, New Treatments, Health Experts, Forums, and Favourites to see recommendations in each category. Your saved items are in Favourites.
tutorial.step7Content: Open Favourites to see your saved new treatments, health library items, and health experts. You can generate a summary report from your selection.
tutorial.step8Content: Select items from your favourites, then click Generate summary to create a personalized report. You can export it as PDF to share with your care team.
tutorial.step9Content: That's me! Click anytime to ask questions about trials, publications, or your dashboard. I'm here to help you navigate your health research journey.

dashboardResearcher.refreshTitleResearcher: Refresh publications, trials and collaborators based on your interests
dashboardResearcher.toastSelectFavouritesForReport: Select items from Favourites to include in your report, then try again.
dashboardResearcher.generateSummaryReportTitle: Generate a PDF summary of your saved items to share with your doctor
dashboardResearcher.generateSummaryReportTitleShort: Generate a PDF summary to share with your doctor
dashboardResearcher.interestsModalIntro: Add or remove interests. Choose up to two to use for personalized search—tap the checkmark to select.
dashboardResearcher.interestsEmptyHint: No interests yet. Add one below.
dashboardResearcher.interestsPrimaryFooterHint: Selected interests (with checkmark) are used for trials, publications, and collaborators. Save then Refresh on the dashboard to update results.

tutorial.step0Content: Hi! I'm Yori. This is your researcher dashboard. Use these blocks to switch between Your Profile, Collaborators, Forums, Publications, Clinical Trials, Favourites, and Meetings.
tutorial.step1Content: Your personalized recommendations appear here—publications, trials, and collaborators tailored to your research interests. You can edit your interests and refresh to get new results.
tutorial.step2Content: Edit your research interests here to personalize your feed. Use Refresh to fetch new recommendations based on your updated profile.
tutorial.step3Content: Switch to the Publications tab to see recommended papers. We'll show you a card and how to view its details.
tutorial.step4Content: In the publications section, use 'View full details' or 'Simplify' on any card to read more. This opens the full abstract and key takeaways.
tutorial.step5Title: Explore dropdown in the top bar
tutorial.step5Content: Use the Explore dropdown in the top bar to view clinical trials, publications, and experts. It's your gateway to discovering new research.
tutorial.step6Content: Forums lets you join community discussions. Discovery is the next link to the right in the navbar; it shows a feed of activity across the platform.
tutorial.step7Content: Switch between Your Profile, Collaborators, Forums, Publications, Clinical Trials, and Favourites. Your saved items are in Favourites.
tutorial.step8Content: Open Favourites to see your saved trials, publications, and collaborators. You can generate a summary report from your selection.
tutorial.step9Content: Select items from your favourites, then click Generate summary to create a personalized report. You can export it as PDF.
tutorial.step10Content: That's me! Click anytime to ask questions about trials, publications, or your dashboard. I'm here to help with your research.

yori.name: Yori
yori.subtitle: Your personal AI assistant
yori.greetingDefault: Hi! I'm **Yori**, your personal AI assistant from collabiora. I can help you find publications, clinical trials, and experts. How can I help you today?
yori.greetingContext: I'm here to help explain this. Ask me anything about it!
yori.disclaimer: Yori is an AI-powered health information tool. The content provided is for informational and educational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional for diagnosis, treatment, or medical decisions. Your information will never be sold or used for commercial purposes.
yori.speechContextHelp: I'm here to help explain this
yori.suggestionTrial1: Tell me more about this trial
yori.suggestionTrial5: What are the potential side effects?
yori.suggestionPub5: Who would benefit from this research?
yori.exploreNavTipLine: Use the Explore dropdown in the top bar to view Health Library, New Treatments, and Health Experts.
yori.placeholderChatFull: This chat is full. Start a new chat to continue.
yori.chatReachedLimitNotice: This chat reached its limit. Download it if needed, then start a new chat.
yori.suggestionFindExpertsDefault: Find experts in my area of interest
yori.suggestionCommunitiesCollabiora: What communities can I join on collabiora?
yori.communitiesCardSubtitle: Join these communities to connect with others.
yori.guestPanelTitle: Sign in to use Yori at its fullest
yori.guestPanelBody: Chat with me for personalized help on publications, trials, and research.
yori.meetingsIntroPatient: Here are your meeting requests. Check status and any replies from researchers in Activity.
yori.meetingsIntroResearcher: Patients who requested to meet you. View full details and respond in Activity.
yori.guestTrialLimit: You've used your free Yori messages. Sign up to keep chatting.

meetingRoom.feedbackRequired: Please tell us what went wrong.
meetingRoom.timeLimitToast: This meeting has reached its 30 minute limit.
meetingRoom.waitingForExpertBanner: The expert hasn't joined yet. They'll be joining shortly — please stay in the room.
meetingRoom.refundNotePatient: Submitting thumbs-down feedback as a patient also triggers a refund request for researcher review.
meetingRoom.unableToJoinBody: This meeting is no longer available or you do not have permission to join it.

emailDelivery.ariaRegion: Email delivery statistics, pending webhook integration
emailDelivery.footnote: Connect Azure webhooks to populate delivered, open, and bounce counts per send (and optionally per recipient below).
